SharedPlaylist.title: SharedPlaylist
SharedPlaylist.description: A playlist of tracks shared using a unique alphanumeric save code.

saveCode.description: The unique 6-character alphanumeric save code used to fetch the playlist across devices.

name.description: The name of the shared playlist.

description.description: A short bio, details, or source description of the playlist.

tracks.description: The list of tracks compiled in this shared playlist.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the playlist was saved.

/playlists/{saveCode}.description: Stores shared music playlists by their unique save codes.
